ast.name: title
ast.source: This model supports tool calling (vault search, file read, web search)
ast.target: 此模型支持工具调用（知识库搜索、文件读取、网络搜索）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select which model generates the agent

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: e.g., A coding assistant that specializes in TypeScript and React, helps with code reviews, and suggests best practices...

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter the agent's initial prompt or instructions...
ast.target: 输入代理的初始提示或指令...

ast.source: Model not set in frontmatter. Please configure a model in settings or frontmatter.

ast.target: 新聊天文件的默认前置元数据。您可以在此处更改/使用 OpenAI API 公开的所有设置：https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference/chat/create

ast.name: description
ast.source: System message that provides context about the Obsidian/ChatGPT MD plugin environment. This helps the AI understand it's working within Obsidian and format responses appropriately.

ast.name: description
ast.source:
URL for Z.AI API. Two modes available:
\u2022 Standard API (pay-per-token): https://api.z.ai/api/paas/v4
\u2022 Coding Plan (subscription): https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic

Default: https://api.z.ai (uses Standard API mode)
ast.target:
Z.AI API的URL。有两种模式可用：
• 标准API（按token付费）：https://api.z.ai/api/paas/v4
• 编程计划（订阅制）：https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic

默认值：https://api.z.ai（使用标准API模式）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default model for Z.AI chats (e.g., zai@glm-4.7)
ast.target: Z.AI聊天的默认模型（例如 zai@glm-4.7）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default temperature for Z.AI chats (0.0 to 1.0)
ast.target: Z.AI聊天的默认温度（0.0 到 1.0）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default max tokens for Z.AI chats
ast.target: Z.AI聊天的默认最大令牌数

ast.source: Default temperature for Ollama chats (0.0 to 2.0)
ast.target: Ollama聊天的默认温度（0.0 到 2.0）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default temperature for LM Studio chats (0.0 to 2.0)
ast.target: LM Studio聊天的默认温度（0.0 到 2.0）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to folder for chat files
ast.target: 聊天文件的文件夹路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to folder for chat file templates
ast.target: 聊天文件模板的文件夹路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path to folder for agent files
ast.target: 代理文件所在文件夹路径

ast.name: description
ast.source: Date format for chat files. Valid date blocks are: YYYY, MM, DD, hh, mm, ss
ast.target: 聊天文件的日期格式。有效的日期块包括：YYYY、MM、DD、hh、mm、ss

ast.name: description
ast.source: Privacy Focus: All tool calls require your explicit approval before the LLM sees the data. Allow the AI to use tools: Search files, Read file contents, Web Search (Privacy focused Brave Search API).
ast.target: 隐私优先：所有工具调用都需要您明确批准，LLM才能看到数据。允许AI使用工具：搜索文件、读取文件内容、网络搜索（隐私优先的Brave Search API）。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
Models allowed to use tools (vault search, file read, web search).

Format: One model pattern per line. Supports wildcards (*).
Examples: 'gpt-4o', 'claude-*', 'gemini-1.5*'

Only tested models are included by default.
ast.target:
允许使用工具（保险库搜索、文件读取、网络搜索）的模型。

格式：每行一个模型模式。支持通配符（*）。
示例：'gpt-4o'、'claude-*'、'gemini-1.5*'

默认仅包含经过测试的模型。

ast.name: description
ast.target: Brave Search 的 API 密钥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use a custom search API endpoint instead of Brave Search
ast.target: 使用自定义搜索 API 端点而非 Brave Search

ast.name: description
ast.source: URL for custom search API endpoint (only when using Custom provider)
ast.target: 自定义搜索 API 端点的 URL（仅在使用自定义提供商时）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum number of search results to return (1-10)
ast.target: 返回的最大搜索结果数量（1-10）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable detailed logging for debugging tool operations. Messages will appear in the console.
ast.target: 启用详细日志记录以调试工具操作。消息将显示在控制台中。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 从 Ollama URL 中移除末尾的 /api/

ast.name: description
ast.source: Removing trailing slash from OpenAI URL
ast.target: 从OpenAI URL中移除尾部的斜杠

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the Obsidian vault for files by name or content. Returns file paths, names, and content previews. Use this to find relevant notes before reading them.
ast.target: 通过名称或内容搜索Obsidian库中的文件。返回文件路径、名称和内容预览。在阅读文件前使用此功能查找相关笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Read the full contents of specific files from the vault. User will be asked to approve which files to share. Use this after searching to get complete file contents.
ast.target: 读取库中特定文件的完整内容。用户需要批准分享哪些文件。在搜索后使用此功能获取完整的文件内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search the web for information on a topic. Returns titles, URLs, and snippets from search results. User will be asked to approve which results to share.
ast.target: 搜索网络上关于某个主题的信息。返回搜索结果中的标题、URL和摘要。用户需要批准分享哪些结果。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Tool not found or has no execute function
ast.target: 未找到工具或工具没有执行函数

ast.name: label
ast.target: 网络地址的 Base64 字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: Failed to read response as array buffer
ast.target: 无法将响应读取为数组缓冲区

ast.name: message
ast.source: system messages are removed for this model
ast.target: 此模型的系统消息已被移除

ast.name: message
ast.source: logprobs is not supported for reasoning models

ast.name: message
ast.source: logitBias is not supported for reasoning models

ast.name: message
ast.source: topLogprobs is not supported for reasoning models

ast.name: message
ast.target: 提示中存在意外的系统消息：${content}

ast.name: message
ast.source: The 'openai-compatible' key in providerOptions is deprecated. Use 'openaiCompatible' instead.
ast.target: providerOptions 中的 'openai-compatible' 键已弃用。请改用 'openaiCompatible'。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 不支持的自定义工具内容部分

ast.name: message
ast.source: sending reasoning content is disabled for this model
ast.target: 此模型已禁用发送推理内容

ast.name: message
ast.source: mcp tool use server name is required and must be a string
ast.target: MCP 工具使用服务器名称必须为字符串且不能为空

ast.name: message
ast.source: code execution tool is required when using skills
ast.target: 使用技能时需要代码执行工具

ast.name: message
ast.source: Both apiKey and authToken were provided. Please use only one authentication method.
ast.target: 同时提供了 apiKey 和 authToken，请仅使用一种认证方式。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No operation name returned from API

ast.name: message
ast.source: No choice in OpenRouter completion response
ast.target: OpenRouter 补全响应中无选项

ast.name: message
ast.source: prompt or messages must be defined
ast.target: 必须定义 prompt 或 messages

ast.name: message
ast.source: prompt and messages cannot be defined at the same time
ast.target: 提示和消息不能同时定义

ast.name: message
ast.source: system must be a string, SystemModelMessage, or array of SystemModelMessage
ast.target: 系统必须是一个字符串、SystemModelMessage或SystemModelMessage数组

ast.name: message
ast.source: The messages do not match the ModelMessage[] schema.

ast.name: message
ast.source: No object generated: could not parse the response.
ast.target: 未生成对象：无法解析响应。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No object generated: response did not match schema.
ast.target: 未生成对象：响应不符合模式。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No output generated. Check the stream for errors.
ast.target: 未生成输出。请检查流中的错误。

ast.source: Enable AI Tool Calling (Experimental, read only)
ast.target: 启用AI工具调用（实验性，只读）

regex.target: text:"您可以在下一个屏幕上选择要分享的文件。"

regex.source: description:"Search the Obsidian vault for files by name or content. Returns file paths, names, and content previews. Use this to find relevant notes before reading them."
regex.target: description:"按名称或内容搜索 Obsidian 仓库中的文件。返回文件路径、名称和内容预览。在读取文件之前，使用此功能查找相关笔记。"

regex.source: description:"Read the full contents of specific files from the vault. User will be asked to approve which files to share. Use this after searching to get complete file contents."
regex.target: description:"读取仓库中特定文件的完整内容。用户将被要求批准分享哪些文件。在搜索后使用此功能获取完整的文件内容。"

regex.source: description:"Search the web for information on a topic. Returns titles, URLs, and snippets from search results. User will be asked to approve which results to share."
regex.target: description:"在网络上搜索某个主题的信息。返回搜索结果中的标题、URL 和摘要。用户将被要求批准分享哪些结果。"

regex.source: name:"Create new chat with highlighted text"
regex.target: name:"用高亮文本创建新聊天"
